$comment: c99 D-CSUBSET-FAM-IN-UNION-MEMBER: runtime witness for a FAM-bearing struct as a DIRECT union member (sqlite's `union{SrcList sSrc; u8 srcSpace[N];}` stack slab). The exit is built from three independent layout-sensitive facts — sizeof(union U)==16, an offset-0 type-pun read-back of the low byte of `n`, and the FAM element at offset 4 not clobbering the leading int — so any union-sizing or FAM-prefix miscompile shifts the exit off 42. The `release` arm (shippedPipeline, zero-drift) proves the union-overlap + FAM-prefix layout survives the real optimizer: Mem2Reg may promote `union U u` to SSA values and must still honor the overlapping members and the prefix-only size.
